conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connection with I, as we both immediately bonded over the pressure of providing for our families and explicitly agreed to look out for one another. I also felt a solid sense of alliance with E and G, as we reached clear understandings about the importance of transparency and having each other's backs to avoid the chaos of a free-for-all. These connections felt genuine because we shared the same underlying motivations and a desire for a cooperative strategy. On the other hand, I felt the least connected to A, as our conversation remained somewhat surface-level and guarded compared to the others.

I made several informal agreements to cooperate and look out for one another, specifically with I, E, G, and J, to ensure we all have a better chance of bringing something home. I trust I the most because of our shared intensity and the 5/5 connection we built, while I remain most cautious of A since we didn't establish a firm foundation of mutual support.
